answer: For designated high-cost international cities - Tokyo, Zurich, and Singapore - the nightly hotel cap is raised to $340.
The /export endpoint is rate-limited separately to 30 requests/minute on every paid tier, including Enterprise, regardless of the global plan limit.
The v2 launch was NOT approved for Q3.
Batteries, as consumable components, carry a limited 12-month warranty.
Claims for water damage carry a separate, higher deductible of $2,500 per occurrence.
Flood is not covered under this policy and is explicitly excluded.
Theft claims must be filed with HomeShield within 30 days, or they may be denied.
The Free plan is best-effort with no uptime SLA.
The Team plan is capped at 25 seats.
For customers in the EU, data is retained for only 30 days after cancellation to comply with GDPR minimization.
Workshop fees are non-refundable once purchased.
Only one transfer per ticket is permitted.
